scripts.test:world-tree-v2-entries: npm run test:tabletop-v2-full && npm run test:detective-v2-full && npm run test:character-v2-long-term && npm run test:entry-closures && npm run test:final-v2-closures
scripts.test:tabletop-v2: npm run test:tabletop-v2-foundation && npm run test:tabletop-v2-runtime
scripts.test:tabletop-v2-full: npm run test:tabletop-v2 && npm run test:tabletop-v2-server-routes && npm run test:tabletop-v2-module-importer && npm run test:tabletop-v2-state-mutation && npm run test:tabletop-v2-gm-loop && npm run test:tabletop-v2-hidden-leak && npm run test:tabletop-v2-asset-resolver

scripts.test:detective-v2-full: npm run test:detective-v2 && npm run test:detective-v2-case-generator
scripts.preflight: node scripts/audit.mjs && node scripts/check.mjs && node scripts/check-docs.mjs && npm run asset:check && npm run test:p0 && npm run test:p1 && npm run test:p2 && npm run test:kernel && npm run test:prompts && npm run test:legacy-mechanisms && npm run test:assets && npm run test:authority && npm run test:legacy-modernization && npm run test:workflow-readiness && npm run workflow:check && npm run test:workflows && npm run test:unit && npm run test:integration && npm run interface-audit
